data.name: applicant-data-transfer
data.changes: Fixed conditional banners: switched listeners to spl-change event and read state from .value instead of .checked for spl-checkbox

data.name: applicant-data-transfer
data.changes: Customize buttons now use compact variant

data.name: applicant-data-transfer
data.changes: Slideout opens only via Edit button; X/Cancel/Esc/backdrop discard, Save persists; Currently transferring summary updates from saved state; default state is no data selected

data.name: applicant-data-transfer
data.changes: Tightened slideout row spacing with uniform 32px rows; info icons all xsmall; updated tooltips for Notes, Application fields, and Screening questions

data.name: applicant-data-transfer
data.changes: Topbar: no active tab; Jobs links to /applicant-list/. Save button starts disabled, enables on any control change or slideout-save commit, disables again after Save click.

data.name: applicant-list
data.description: Receptionist job — applicants list page (job header, status counters strip, sub-tabs, search + filter pills, applicants table with 7 rows)

data.name: applicant-list
data.changes: Switched row icons to FramePerson; row 3-dots to DotsHorizontal; replaced fake US flag with proper SVG. Added per-row action menu popover (Reject, Defer, Hire, etc., with 'Add to job' highlighted). 'Add to job' opens a 2-step ADT dialog (Transfer settings → Data to copy) with overlay backdrop, dynamic applicant name, and stepper that shows a check on the completed step.

data.name: applicant-list
data.changes: ADT dialog step 1 now respects admin settings (source visibility, original-application variants), destination job search returns mocked results

data.name: applicant-data-transfer
data.changes: Persist admin settings to localStorage on Save so the ADT dialog can read them

data.name: applicant-list
data.changes: Step 2 'Information to copy' rendered dynamically from saved data-to-copy items; screening sub-options resolve to 'Preconfigured screening questions responses' / 'Job specific screening questions' (DEI omitted)

data.name: applicant-data-transfer
data.changes: Persist + restore screening sub-state and admin radio/checkbox selections via localStorage so the page reflects last-saved settings

Added avatar dropdown menu (Settings, My referrals, Marketplace, Product updates, Customer community, SmartRecruiters University, Contact support, Feedback, Switch to employee portal, Logout) in main.js; Settings links to /applicant-data-transfer/

data.name: applicant-list
